data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. MIDNIGHT RHYTHM should be peaking now after finishing a close second over 1300m at this track last time at the third run of the campaign. Is drawn to advantage on the inside for Roper and is ready to go one better. 6. LOBBYIST couldn't quite match the turn of foot of the trio ahead of her at Muswellbrook but was far from disgraced. Rock-hard fit now and doesn't need to improve much to get the verdict. 4. EXORBITANT MISS comes through a hot maiden and while she didn't inspire much confidence, she's still relatively lightly raced and is open to improvement. 7. MOONSPELL strips fitter third-up and may be able to sneak a minor spot.","runners":[1,6,4,7],"exclusive":false}
